targets.query: from(bucket: "network") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "internet_speed" and r._field == "download_bps") |> drop(columns: ["server"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000000.0 })) |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "network") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "internet_speed" and r._field == "upload_bps") |> drop(columns: ["server"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000000.0 })) |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "network") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "internet_speed" and r._field == "latency_ms") |> drop(columns: ["server"]) |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "network") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "internet_speed" and r._field == "download_bps") |> drop(columns: ["server"]) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000000.0 }))

from(bucket: "network") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "internet_speed" and r._field == "upload_bps") |> drop(columns: ["server"]) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000000.0 }))
